violations.text: Various pre-packaged items (egg bites, breakfast sandwiches, bagel bites) was observed held at 44-47 degrees Fahrenheit. At the time of inspection, the unit was set to 33 degrees Fahrenheit with the ambient air temperature reading 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The food was placed in the unit under 2 hours prior to inspection. All foods moved to the walk-in cooler to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The cold drawer unit located in the prep area was observed to be set to 33 degrees Fahrenheit and maintaining an ambient air temperature of 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit taken out of service at the time of inspection until it can be serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
